windows/system-cleaning/how-to-check-sta.filePath: Windows/System Cleaning/How to Check Starting Programs.md
windows/system-cleaning/how-to-check-sta.title: How to Check Starting Programs
windows/system-cleaning/how-to-check-sta.content:
Open Task Manger
Go to Startup Apps Tab
Make sure to disable the unnecessary starting programs by right clicking and setting to Disable.

index.title: Welcome to Quartz
index.content:
This is a blank Quartz installation.
See the documentation for how to get started.
